mapper.select: SELECT event_id AS eventId, employee_id AS employeeId, event_title AS eventTitle, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, event_category AS eventCategory, created_at AS createdAt FROM calendar_event WHERE (SUBSTR(start_date, 1, 7) = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')) OR SUBSTR(end_date, 1, 7) = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar_event (employee_id, event_title, start_date, end_date, event_category, created_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{eventTitle}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{eventCategory}, NOW())
